Dry Cleaning Carpet & Upholstery

Gentle Care, Immaculate Results

Preserve the beauty and longevity of your aircraft's interior with our Dry Cleaning Carpet & Upholstery service. Using advanced dry-cleaning techniques, we provide a deep, effective clean without the risks of water or steam damage.

Perfect for delicate materials, this service removes dirt, stains, and allergens while maintaining the integrity of your carpets and upholstery, leaving them fresh, clean, and ready to impress.

Benefits

  • Safe for Delicate Materials: Protects upholstery and carpets from damage caused by water or steam.
  • Deep and Effective Cleaning: Removes dirt, stains, and allergens while preserving fabric integrity.
  • Residue-Free Process: Leaves carpets and upholstery clean without sticky or wet residues.
  • Eco-Friendly Method: Minimizes water usage and avoids harsh chemicals, promoting sustainability.
  • Enhanced Appearance: Restores the fresh, clean look of your interior fabrics.
  • Increased Longevity: Maintains the quality and durability of your carpets and upholstery over time.
